title: 通用选面 90% 双指标优化 TODO（单数据集受控计划）

project.generalization_boundary: No independent validation parts are available. Results are single-dataset regression evidence and must not be presented as proven cross-part generalization.

global_rules.runtime_reference_policy: Production selector, pipeline, candidate generation, and their tests must not read reference STEP, truth mapping, evaluation results, dataset identity, face ID, part ID, SHA, known counts, or labels.
fixed_production_boundaries: AABB fallback is prohibited unless diagnosis finds prefilter_false_rejection
accepted pairs require positive exact projected overlap
new policies remain offline until OP10 passes
global_rules.default_change_policy: Keep the current 1.5 mm production default unless OP08 proves feasibility and OP09/OP10 strictly exceed both quality thresholds.
step_completion_policy: Each step starts pass=false and is changed to true only after all strict tests pass.
Each completed step updates DEVLOG.md and TODO pass state in the same commit.
After weld_core changes run full pytest; before commit run git diff --check; after commit git status --short must be empty.

steps.goal: Freeze the strict single-dataset >90% target and the non-generalization boundary without changing production selection.
changes: Record the 30/6/10 baseline and strict precision>0.90, recall>0.90 gate.
Record FN composition: four gap, four AABB, two same-part; same-part and AABB fallback are not production recovery paths.
State that no independent validation data exists and no generalization claim is permitted.
steps.completion_commit: chore: freeze 90 percent plane selection target

steps.goal: Offline-only, replay cross-part 1.5-6 mm gap rejections with exact overlap and decide whether TP>=37 is geometrically feasible under fixed boundaries.
changes: Add a managed offline diagnosis with 1.5-3, 3-4.5, and 4.5-6 mm tiers, exact area, coverage, effective width, score, reason, and deterministic recovery status.
Use evaluation truth only to report the theoretical recoverable FN upper bound; do not expose it to runtime.
Require the current AABB diagnosis to have zero prefilter_false_rejection; if the theoretical upper TP is below 37, report the target unreachable and leave all production defaults unchanged.
steps.completion_commit: feat: diagnose exact gap recovery feasibility

steps.goal: Only if OP08 proves feasibility, implement and search strict/extended/outer exact-overlap quality policies offline.
changes: Keep strict gap<=0.2 behavior; apply stronger independent coverage, area, width, and score gates to extended 0.2-1.5 and outer 1.5-6 layers.
Select a policy only when both metrics are strictly >0.90; maximize recall then precision.
Do not aggregate weak supporting pairs or enable same-part/AABB fallback.
steps.completion_commit: feat: search layered pair quality policy

steps.goal: Promote only a feasible, strictly >90% offline policy and deliver complete regression evidence.
changes: Run the complete managed regression and all offline reports; register every artifact.
Update production default only after strict metrics pass; otherwise preserve 1.5 mm default.
Update README, CLI, JSON contract, DEVLOG, and state that this remains single-dataset evidence.
steps.completion_commit: feat: optimize layered plane selection quality
